findings.description: Env var mutation outside try block leaks on ensure_telemetry_initialized() failure
findings.proposedRule: [P58] Place ALL failable code inside try block when using env var save/restore

findings.description: OPENLINEAGE_URL silently ignored when manifest has HTTP transport but no endpoint — early return fires before env var check
findings.proposedRule: [P59] Env var overrides must be checked before missing-config guards

findings.description: Wiring test using real compile_pipeline() with demo files placed in unit/ tier
findings.proposedRule: [P60] Tests invoking full compilation with real files belong in integration tier

findings.description: Moving wiring test class to new file left orphaned unittest.mock.patch import
findings.proposedRule: [P61] Run ruff check on both source and destination after moving code

findings.description: NoOp tracer produces all-zero trace IDs — add_trace_context skips injection for these
findings.proposedRule: [P62] Tests validating trace context must set OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT before ensure_telemetry_initialized()
